<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox threat
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.numberLabel) { -%>
|number_label=<%~ it.numberLabel %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.tierNum) { -%>
|tier=<%~ it.tierNum %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.colorHex) { -%>
|color=<%~ it.colorHex %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.hasRewardsSection) { %>
<section begin="rewards" />
<%~ it.rewardsSection -%>
<section end="rewards" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Threats]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated threat source pages]]
